sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48391" key="qerapni/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερᾰπ-νίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet., <sense id="n48391.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θεραπαινίς</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.603</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
